HGSS.102.0001:
Oh my!
I fell asleep and ruined my chances\r
of being the first to arrive here...\f
Stupid, stupid me...
Sob...sob...
HGSS.102.0003:
Click, click, click...
Oh! It is you!\f
I’ve gotten over being first all
the time.\f
Now I’m counting the number of people
coming to the Battle Frontier.\r
Of course no one asked me to.\r
It’s just a hobby.
HGSS.102.0004:
I can’t stop shivering!\f
I told my family that I would conquer
the Battle Frontier when I left home...\f
But now I’m here, and somehow I
can’t stop shivering!\f
What am I gonna do if I get beaten
to a pulp?\f
HGSS.102.0005:
...You look quite young.\f
...
...\f
I will pull myself together and
challenge the Battle Frontier...\r
Maybe!\f
HGSS.102.0006:
I will pull myself together and
challenge the Battle Frontier!\f
...
Or I might not!\f
HGSS.102.0007:
Finally!
I’m here at the Battle Frontier!\f
When a Pokémon battle on the road
doesn’t satisfy you any longer, you\r
have to come to the Battle Frontier!\f
Wouldn’t you agree?
HGSS.102.0008:
Normally, choosing which Pokémon is all
there is to a Pokémon battle.\f
But when you change certain rules or
limitations, the battle suddenly\r
becomes even more fun.\f
And this place you can have such fun...
is called the Battle Frontier!
HGSS.102.0009:
This Is the Battle Frontier\f
Come, Proud Trainers
Aim for the Top!
